Native HTML5 Port Workspace

Super Fancy Pants Adventure

This site now targets the native OpenFL/Starling port instead of the older Flash emulation path. The playable content is still being translated, but the shell, scene flow, state bridge, and deployment bundle are now built around the native runtime.

Game Frame

Loading the native runtime and waiting for the embedded app to report state.

Connection Connecting
Scene Unknown
Route Unknown
Launching native port

The outer website shell is ready. The embedded OpenFL app will report its scene and route state here once the bridge connects.

Live App State

View Mode

Selected Route

Loaded Route
Unknown
Language
Unknown
One-Handed
Unknown

Keyboard Controls

  • Route browser: W/S directory, A/D level, Q/E door, Enter load
  • Scene switches: M map, L level select, R respawn, Esc resume
  • Quick transitions: B bonus, F finish / return
  • Settings: G language, X fullscreen flag, O one-handed flag

Bridge Inspector

Waiting for snapshot...
